name: One Swing Away Golf - Queen Creek, AZ
address: 21258 E Rittenhouse Rd STE 109, Queen Creek, AZ 85142
about: One Swing Away Golf is a golf simulator venue located in Queen Creek, Arizona, offering year-round access to state-of-the-art Full Swing Sport simulators. The facility provides an indoor golf experience with features such as 24/7 member access, a continuously expanding library of world-renowned golf courses, and interactive practice ranges. Memberships are available with varying tiers, and the venue also offers public access during select hours. Their PGA Tour-licensed technology is designed to provide accurate swing data and an authentic golfing experience for players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Elite Full Swing simulator technology trusted by PGA Tour professionals
24/7 access for members allowing for flexible practice and play schedules
Unlimited use with no session limits, only time limits per booking
Instant, detailed swing analytics to accelerate improvement
Variety of game modes for all skill levels and social play options

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food and drinks are permitted, with a requirement to clean up after use. No alcohol is allowed on the premises.
Alcohol is not permitted on the premises.

simulator_hardware.notes: Official PGA Tour simulator partner used by champions like Tiger Woods and Jon Rahm.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are currently required to bring your own set of clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food and drinks are allowed, but you must clean up afterward. Alcohol is not permitted on the premises.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, you can expect it to take about 45 minutes to an hour to play 18 holes, depending on skill level.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the simulator golf experience is perfect for all ages and skill levels, offering a variety of ways to enjoy the game.
